positive: Stylized celestial bioluminescent fauna and flora arranged in a balanced, symmetrical mandala pattern. Central subject is a majestic, ethereal stag with spiraling antlers adorned with glowing, stylized moons and crescent vines. Surrounding the stag are intricate, abstract mandalas of stylized cosmic butterflies, geometric constellations, and glowing tropical lilies. The overall aesthetic is Japanese woodblock print meets modern psychedelic tattoo art. High contrast, deep indigo and emerald color palette with accents of luminous gold and soft magenta. Crisp lines, solid silhouettes, highly detailed linework, vector illustration quality, perfect for apparel print.
negative: blur, low resolution, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, realistic photo, amateur drawing, noise, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, extra limbs
